allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 LocalPort, State, OwningProcess; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object -Unique Id, ProcessName)
